text: You step into the Underground Sealed Cave.\n\nThe passage splits into three paths: a paved road to the left, a dark path straight ahead, and a bright corridor to the right.
options: Go left → 2, Go straight → 11, Go right → 3

text: You proceed along the paved road to the left.\nPart of the floor turns out to be a switch, and when you accidentally step on it, an iron automaton embedded in the wall activates.
You proceed down the bright corridor to the right.\nYou find a storage box left on a shelf in the wall.
Inside is dried meat!\nYou gain 1 Food.
A distorted sealing script is carved into the door ahead.\nThis place seems relatively safe.
options: Push the sealing letters with force → 5, Read the seal → 5

text: You enter the central chamber of the Sealed Cave.\nAt that moment, a massive shadow drops down from the ceiling.
The guardian of the seal—an ogre nearly 3 meters tall—blocks your path.
The guardian collapses, and an altar appears beyond it.\nIt seems you have a moment to catch your breath. You may eat as much as you like.
options: Examine the altar → 8, Watch your surroundings → 9

text: The orb upon the altar glows faintly.
A remaining device suddenly activates behind you!\nPale blue lightning races through the corridor.
options: Attempt to dodge → 91, Attempt to force your way through → 92

text: You slip beneath the lightning at the last moment!\nThe device sparks and falls silent.
You force your way through, but the lightning burns your shoulder!\nYou grimace in pain.

The Sealed Cave returns to silence.

You seal the cave once more and begin the journey home.

As long as you live, peace will likely endure.
When you take the dark path in the middle, you arrive at a familiar place.\nIsn’t this the entrance where you started?\nExhausted from the futile effort, you lose 4 Stamina.
